codeReview.summary: The blocking issue identified by the prior scrutiny validator persists: files_analyzed is hardcoded to 0, calculate_coverage_metrics returns hardcoded defaults (0.75, 0.65, 0.80), and run_static_coverage_analysis always falls back to empty Vec when llvm-cov succeeds. The implementation does not parse actual llvm-cov coverage data.

issues.description: files_analyzed is hardcoded to 0 in CoverageReport construction within analyze_coverage(). Comment says 'Would need to track this' but tracking is never implemented.

calculate_coverage_metrics always returns hardcoded defaults (0.75, 0.65, 0.80). The code attempts to run 'cargo llvm-cov report --json' but never parses the output - it just returns defaults after the attempt.

run_static_coverage_analysis returns Ok(Vec::new()) when llvm-cov succeeds, meaning actual coverage gaps from llvm-cov are not captured. When llvm-cov fails, it falls back to basic_static_analysis_static which only does simple pattern matching on source files, not actual coverage data.
run_mutation_testing checks for 'target/debug' in path to use mock data, but this is a simplistic heuristic that may not accurately detect when to use real vs mock data.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature description says 'Mutation testing and static analysis' but actual llvm-cov integration is missing. Coverage data is simulated with hardcoded values rather than parsed from real tools.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: analyze_coverage() returns hardcoded files_analyzed: 0 and calculate_coverage_metrics() returns (0.75, 0.65, 0.80) - these are not from actual coverage analysis

summary: Review FAIL - Blocking issue persists: files_analyzed hardcoded to 0, calculate_coverage_metrics returns hardcoded defaults (0.75, 0.65, 0.80), run_static_coverage_analysis always returns empty Vec or simple pattern-based gaps. No actual llvm-cov coverage data is parsed. The handoff claims 29/31 tests passed but test_analyze_coverage_returns_report was modified to use mock data (enable_mutation_testing: false, enable_static_analysis: false), and test_run_mutation_testing times out. The implementation provides a scaffolding but the core coverage analysis is not functional.
